title: Currents API Vocabulary
description: Domain terms and concepts used in the Currents API

terms.definition: A news article aggregated from one of 120,000+ global sources
ISO 639-1 two-letter code identifying the language of a news article
A topical classification assigned to a news article
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for regional news filtering
Search terms used to filter news articles by content relevance
Lower bound for article publication date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+00:00)
Upper bound for article publication date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+00:00)
The most recently published news articles from all tracked sources
Full-text and filter-based search across the indexed news corpus
The set of language codes currently supported for filtering
The set of country or region codes currently supported for filtering
The set of category labels currently supported for filtering
Authentication mechanism using an API key supplied in the Authorization HTTP header
